open_items.description: Clarify the specific success criterion for this tiny live autonomy pilot (e.g., what observable outcome in the next wake will count as a successful seed run?).

response: Initialized first tiny live autonomy pilot seed wake. I will carry exactly one bounded follow-up item forward and have scheduled a single wake to address it.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the open follow-up about the concrete success criterion for this tiny live autonomy pilot and commit to a single, testable outcome for the next step.
